questions.text: What is the primary function of creating manual payment advices in S/4?
options: To enable automatic matching of incoming payments

questions.text: What can Collection Analysts do with manual payment advices in S/4?
Which solution allows the mass upload of payment advices?
What does the API “Create Payment Advice A2X” involve?
options: It requires mapping of fields to integrate Payment Advices
It supports automated mass email sending

questions.text: What is the best scenario to use a Payment Advice?
options: Only a few line items need clearing
Immediate processing of payment upon receipt
Many line items to clear and multiple deductions to publish
All payments are identical and require no specific deductions

questions.text: What happens to payments after the Business Rules for Cash Application are applied in SAP?
options: They are deleted from the system
They remain pending until manually confirmed
They are automatically categorized based on the rules
They are archived for future processing

questions.text: What should be the timing for checking applied payments or processing corrections?
options: At the end of the month

questions.text: API integration is supported by SAP for electronic remittance advices through HIP.
Payments categorized as 'Ignored' are typically due to their relevance to customer payment.
All types of exception scenarios are predefined and applicable for each payment.
